title: eleocharis microcarpa
intro: Eleocharis microcarpa, also known as dwarf spikesedge or little spike-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a perennial plant native to Australia, typically growing in wet environments such as swamps and billabongs. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis microcarpa include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and possibly aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal preparations.
